testcase.name: test_navigation_to_signup

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')' Actual value: https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJYD4H4MDG94E02HD8STPTY6 Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms - unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/" 5 × unexpected value "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJYD4H4MDG94E02HD8STPTY6"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1/test_page_1.py:33: in test_navigation_to_signup expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/signup")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')' E Actual value: https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJYD4H4MDG94E02HD8STPTY6 E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E - unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/" E 5 × unexpected value "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJYD4H4MDG94E02HD8STPTY6"

testcase.name: test_footer_links_visible

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Pricing\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Pricing aka locator("footer").get_by_role("link", name="Pricing") Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Pricing\")]")
